news.title: STAT+: Why Marty Makary was the worst FDA commissioner in 25 years
news.summary: Marty Makary, who resigned under pressure from the FDA, brought to the job a fundamental lack of understanding of the nature of the role, STAT's Matthew Herper writes.

news.title: Males who discuss suicide seek help less often than females, report finds
news.summary: Out of 1.5 million messages received in 2025, the Crisis Text Line found that less then 20% of the texters identified as male only

news.title: STAT+: European Union inks a draft deal to boost local production of medicines and avoid shortages
news.summary: The E.U. reached a provisional deal to strengthen the supply of essential medicines and avoid shortages by ‌boosting domestic production and reducing reliance on imports.

news.title: STAT+: Makary departs FDA amid turmoil as Diamantas, agency’s top food official, steps in
news.summary: Food and Drug Administration Commissioner Marty Makary is resigning from his role after a tumultuous tenure.

news.title: Supreme Court extends mifepristone deadline
news.summary: The deadliest drug in the country, the new name for PCOS, and more health news from Morning Rounds

news.title: STAT+: Hims takes a $33 million hit from GLP-1 ‘pivot’
news.summary: In this edition of STAT Health Tech: Hims earnings, Omada's PBM strategy, and the uphill battle faced by new sepsis algorithms.

news.title: STAT+: Hims’ sales miss as telehealth competition grows
news.summary: Bristol's partnership with Hengrui Pharma, Viiv loses HIV treatment case, and more biotech news from The Readout

news.title: STAT+: STAT examines America’s deadliest drug
news.summary: STAT examines America's failure to address excessive alcohol use across decades.

news.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about pharma lobbying, Bristol’s deal with a Chinese partner, and more
news.summary: The 17 pharmaceutical companies anchoring TrumpRx poured more than $130 million into federal lobbying in 2025 — a nearly 23% surge

news.title: STAT+: Capsida says it still doesn’t know what caused gene therapy death
news.summary: Some in the gene therapy field lament lost time while Capsida kept silent about the brain receptor it was targeting when things went wrong.

news.title: STAT+: In the battle of sepsis algorithms, performance alone doesn’t predict victory
news.summary: As new AI models for predicting sepsis hit the market, experts say performance alone will not drive adoption by hospitals.

news.title: PCOS’s new name is PMOS, a small letter change that required a big scientific process
news.summary: A revised name for PCOS — polyendocrine metabolic ovarian syndrome, or PMOS — was introduced in a paper published Tuesday.

news.title: STAT+: Patients jockey for exemptions from Medicaid’s new work requirements
news.summary: Advocates for people with HIV and sickle cell disease are among those pushing for exemptions from Medicaid’s new work requirements.

news.title: Opinion: STAT+: Pharma and biotech leaders are destroying their own industry
news.summary: American biotech leaders are destroying their own industry.

news.title: 6 takeaways from STAT’s investigation into the U.S. alcohol epidemic
news.summary: Alcohol is the culprit behind the United States' most enduring and overlooked drug crisis. Here are 6 takeaways from STAT's new investigative series, The Deadliest Drug.

news.title: Mayo Clinic CEO Gianrico Farrugia stepping down at year's end
news.summary: Mayo Clinic is looking for a new leader as Gianrico Farrugia, M.D., who has served as president and CEO since 2019, announced he would step down at the end of this year.

news.title: University of California, union near May 14 strike deadline with no deal in hand
news.summary: A union representing 25,000 UC Health service and patient care workers has so far rebuffed updated contract offers from the public institution. More talks are scheduled through Wednesday.

news.title: Hims & Hers posts $92M loss in Q1 as it shifts to branded GLP-1 medications
news.summary: Online health and wellness company Hims & Hers posted a $92 million loss in the first quarter as it transitions its weight loss business to selling branded GLP-1 weight loss treatments, shifting away from compounded weight loss drugs.

news.title: Providence puts years of losses in rearview with its third consecutive quarter of operating gains
news.summary: The West Coast nonprofit health system reported a 1.5% operating margin and roughly $360 million net improvement for the first quarter, which management attributed to a slew of restructures, divestitures and other initiatives.

news.title: FDA Commissioner Marty Makary to resign, capping turbulent tenure: report
news.summary: Marty Makary, M.D., is resigning as FDA commissioner Tuesday, ending a brief but tumultuous tenure marked by mounting criticism from all sides, according to reports.

news.title: 1 in 5 marketplace enrollees dropped their coverage in 2026: media report
news.summary: About 21% of people who enrolled in coverage through Healthcare.gov have dropped out this year, according to a new report.

news.title: Fitness wearable Whoop adds on-demand clinician access, EHR syncing
news.summary: The company says these updates will allow users to “gain a deeper understanding” of how medications, conditions and procedures can impact performance.

news.title: As public vaccine criticism quiets, RFK Jr. keeps safety inquiries running in background: NYT
news.summary: Amid apparent overtures from the Trump administration to curb public vaccine criticism ahead of the midterms this fall, the secretary of the Department of Health and Human Services is allegedly continuing his crusade in the background.

news.title: Optum Rx unveils new transparent PBM model
news.summary: UnitedHealth Group's pharmacy benefit manager, Optum Rx, is making the shift to a more transparent model, the company announced Monday.

news.title: Skil-Care launches specialized healthcare product innovation program
news.summary: Through the new program, organizations and clinicians can work with the manufacturer to turn frontline needs into products.

news.title: Included Health launches AI-powered solution to connect members to providers
news.summary: The new tool, dubbed Provider Connect, is embedded in the virtual care company’s AI assistant.

news.title: The broken pipeline of mental healthcare for LGBTQ teenagers
news.summary: Despite strong demand, 44% of LGBTQ youth who want mental healthcare say they cannot access it. Fierce Healthcare and Uncloseted Media investigate why.

news.title: Kyverna begins rolling submission for autoimmune CAR-T as FDA requests more natural history analysis
news.summary: Kyverna Therapeutics has officially started a rolling submission to the FDA for miv-cel as the company conducts additional natural history analysis at the agency's request, keeping the candidate on track to be the first autoimmune CAR-T to reach the market.

news.title: FDA Commissioner Marty Makary to resign, capping turbulent tenure: report
news.summary: Marty Makary, M.D., is resigning as FDA commissioner Tuesday, ending a brief but tumultuous tenure marked by mounting criticism from all sides, according to reports.

news.title: Alphabet's AI biotech Isomorphic Labs bags $2.1B series B to fuel next-gen drug design model
news.summary: If any proof was needed that big money is still available for AI drug development, look no further than the 10-figure series B hauled in by Isomorphic Labs.

news.title: Fierce Biotech Fundraising Tracker '26: Isomorphic's $2B series B; Cytospire's $83M for TCEs
news.summary: The Fierce Biotech Fundraising Tracker records venture capital rounds of $50 million or more secured by biotechs.

news.title: Boehringer furthers inflammatory expansion with €407M biobucks bet on Immunitas asset
news.summary: Boehringer Ingelheim has put up 407.5 million euros in biobucks to secure global rights to a first‑in‑class antibody Immunitas Therapeutics is developing for chronic inflammatory and autoimmune diseases.

news.title: AstraZeneca’s $800M bet undermined by immunogenicity in phase 3
news.summary: Immunogenicity dragged on the efficacy of AstraZeneca’s rare endocrine disorder prospect in a phase 3 trial, causing the $800 million molecule’s response rate to fall short of the bar set by Ascendis Pharma’s Yorvipath.

news.title: Charles River debuts AI diagnostic tool to cut down pathology timelines
news.summary: Charles River is rolling out an artificial intelligence-backed digital pathology platform with a goal of trimming at least one week from standard pathology timelines and workflows.

news.title: Roche nabs European approval for second Eli Lilly-partnered Alzheimer’s test
news.summary: Roche has secured a European CE mark for its second Alzheimer’s test that can both help confirm the disease and rule it out.

news.title: Blood-based approach could detect early heart, kidney disease, study finds
news.summary: Scientists know that damage to microscopic blood vessels can provide an early warning sign of heart and kidney disease. But current methods for monitoring these tiny vessels are too impractical for widespread screening.

news.title: Bayer scraps protein therapy for hypertension from phase 1, along with neuropathic pain drug
news.summary: Bayer has removed a protein therapeutic for hypertension and a treatment for diabetic neuropathic pain from its phase 1 pipeline.

news.title: Enterprise reports phase 2 cystic fibrosis win, succeeding where Big Pharma stumbled
news.summary: A phase 2 trial of Enterprise Therapeutics’ cystic fibrosis drug candidate has hit its primary endpoint, furthering the biotech’s pursuit of a target that companies including Vertex have worked on previously.

news.title: Bristol Myers Squibb inks $15B biobucks deal to bag Hengrui assets, tap China’s R&D speed
news.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb has formed a broad partnership with Hengrui Pharma, paying $600 million upfront to advance 13 early-stage programs from across the two companies’ pipelines. The deal could be worth up to $15.2 billion.

news.title: 谨道行肛肠微创诊疗系统完成首批形成性试验，获评“颠覆性创新”
news.summary: 目前，该产品已完成开模定型，即将进入型式检验阶段。

news.title: AI时代，九家“旧经济”巨头的逆袭法则
news.summary: AI时代，穿越技术周期的五组密码。

news.title: 硅基时代的双螺旋：AI时代To B与To C的底座兼容与组织升维
news.summary: AI时代To B与To C的兼容与组织升维。

papers.title: SeePhys Pro: Diagnosing Modality Transfer and Blind-Training Effects in Multimodal RLVR for Physics Reasoning
papers.summary: We introduce SeePhys Pro, a fine-grained modality transfer benchmark that studies whether models preserve the same reasoning capability when critical information is progressively transferred from text to image. Unlike standard vision-essential benchmarks that evaluate a single input form, SeePhys Pro features four semantically aligned variants for each problem with progressively increasing visual elements. Our evaluation shows that current frontier models are far from representation-invariant reasoners: performance degrades on average as information moves from language to diagrams, with visual

papers.title: AlphaGRPO: Unlocking Self-Reflective Multimodal Generation in UMMs via Decompositional Verifiable Reward
papers.summary: In this paper, we propose AlphaGRPO, a novel framework that applies Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to AR-Diffusion Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) to enhance multimodal generation capabilities without an additional cold-start stage. Our approach unlocks the model's intrinsic potential to perform advanced reasoning tasks: Reasoning Text-to-Image Generation, where the model actively infers implicit user intents, and Self-Reflective Refinement, where it autonomously diagnoses and corrects misalignments in generated outputs. To address the challenge of providing stable supervision for

papers.title: Addressing Performance Saturation for LLM RL via Precise Entropy Curve Control
papers.summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has enabled complex reasoning abilities in large language models (LLMs). However, most RL algorithms suffer from performance saturation, preventing continued gains as RL training scales. This problem can be characterized by the collapse of entropy, a key diagnostic for exploration in RL. Existing attempts focus on preventing entropy collapse through regularization or clipping. However, their resulting entropy curves often exhibit instability in the long term, which hinders performance gains. In this paper, we introduce Entrocraft, a simple rejection-sampling approac
